message:
Add E2E tests for project-local vs personal skill installation

Test coverage for --project flag functionality:
- Install skills to personal location (default)
- Install skills to project-local location (--project)
- List skills from both/filtered locations
- Uninstall with location-specific --project flag
- Verify isolation between personal and project skills

Closes bead: ygup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
